title: Account Settings
subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and preferences

deletion_pending.title: Account Deletion Pending
deletion_pending.body_prefix: Your account is scheduled for deletion on
deletion_pending.body_suffix: You can cancel this request at any time before that date.

gdpr.heading: Privacy & Data Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.download_desc: You have the right to receive a copy of all personal data we hold about you, including your profile information, purchase history, subscription data, and session logs in a machine-readable JSON format.
gdpr.danger_warning_text: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone after the 30-day grace period.
gdpr.danger_item1: Your profile and personal information will be permanently removed.
gdpr.danger_item2: Your purchase history will be anonymized for legal and tax records.
gdpr.danger_item3: All active subscriptions will be cancelled.
gdpr.danger_item4: You will lose access to all purchased and subscribed modules.

modal.title: Confirm Account Deletion
modal.warning: This action will schedule your account for permanent deletion.
modal.desc: Please enter your password to confirm. Your account will be deleted 30 days from today. You can cancel this request at any time during this period.
